title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 260.1083
text:
*260.1083.  Fee not authorized, when. — Sections 260.1050 to 260.1101 do not authorize the department to impose a fee, including a recycling fee or registration fee, on a consumer, manufacturer, retailer, or person who recycles or reuses equipment.
(L. 2008 S.B. 720) 
*Contingent expiration date, see § 260.1092
